Root.desc: A component at the root of any logged-in pages. Can be used for creating modals and pop-ups that display over the whole app. Does not override any existing component.

PostTypePlugin.desc: The component displaying the message body of posts. For adding new components based on post type. Use in your `postTypeComponents` argument to `registerComponents` in your plugin's intialization function.

compactDisplay.desc: Set to true if UI is in compact display mode

isRHS.desc: Set to true if the post is in the right-hand sidebar (thread, search results, etc.)

ChannelHeaderButton.desc: A component on the right side of the channel header, beside buttons such as the pinned posts button.

MobileChannelHeaderButton.desc: Same as ChannelHeaderButton, except shown in mobile view when the screen is less than 768 pixels wide.

ChannelSettingsTab.desc: A channel settings tab registered via registerChannelSettingsTab. A registration is either a declarative schema (sections + onSave) where the host renders the controls and owns the save bar, or a custom component that renders the whole tab body. Both branches accept uiName, icon, and shouldRender(state, channel). The 'props' below describe what a custom tab component receives.

setUnsaved.desc: Reports whether the custom tab currently has unsaved changes so the host can show its save bar

registerHandlers.desc: Registers { save, reset } handlers (or null to clear) for the host-owned SaveChangesPanel. The host calls save when the user clicks Save; reject the returned Promise to keep the tab dirty and surface a plugin-owned error. reset is called when the user clicks Reset.
